'''gazhubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobmistress|jobmistress]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobmistress|jobmistress]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gazhubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæzhibith|gæzhibith]] || [[word:gæzhibij|gæzhibij]] || [[word:gæzhibish|gæzhibish]] || [[word:gæzhibi|gæzhibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gazhuzhubuth|gazhuzhubuth]] || [[word:gazhuzhubuj|gazhuzhubuj]] || [[word:gazhuzhubush|gazhuzhubush]] || [[word:gazhuzhubu|gazhuzhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gazhubuth|gazhubuth]] || [[word:gazhubuj|gazhubuj]] || [[word:gazhubush|gazhubush]] || [[word:gazhubu|gazhubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gazhufbuth|gazhufbuth]] || [[word:gazhufbuj|gazhufbuj]] || [[word:gazhufbush|gazhufbush]] || [[word:gazhufbuf|gazhufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gazhubuthu|gazhubuthu]] || [[word:gazhubuju|gazhubuju]] || [[word:gazhubushu|gazhubushu]] || [[word:gazhubuku|gazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gazhubuth|gazhubuth]] || [[word:gazhubuj|gazhubuj]] || [[word:gazhubush|gazhubush]] || [[word:gazhubu|gazhubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gazhubuthul|gazhubuthul]] || [[word:gazhubujul|gazhubujul]] || [[word:gazhubushul|gazhubushul]] || [[word:gazhubukul|gazhubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gazhubuthuthu|gazhubuthuthu]] || [[word:gazhubujuju|gazhubujuju]] || [[word:gazhubushushu|gazhubushushu]] || [[word:gazhubuku|gazhubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gazhubuthun|gazhubuthun]] || [[word:gazhubujun|gazhubujun]] || [[word:gazhubushun|gazhubushun]] || [[word:gazhubukun|gazhubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gazhubuthuoro|gazhubuthuoro]] || [[word:gazhubujuoro|gazhubujuoro]] || [[word:gazhubushuoro|gazhubushuoro]] || [[word:gazhubukuoro|gazhubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
